productDisplayName: Esprit Men Rosegold Legacy Copper Watches
description: Taking traditional designs and giving it modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. This classic Legacy analog wrist watch from esprit is no exception. Contemporary and trendy, it& rsquo s an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Case diameter: 45 mm Case thickness: 12 mm Dial shape: Round Rose gold plated stainless steel case with a fixed black bezel embossed with minute markings at a 5-minute interval for added durability, style and comfort Leather strap with a tang clasp Durable, scratch-resistant mineral crystal glass Black dial with rose gold and fluorescent hour markings and chronographic seconds markings, with date socket at 3 o& rsquo clock position Fluorescent hour markings and hands for easy visibility in low light conditions Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time and date Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 100 meters, allowing you to use it when swimming, snorkeling and water Sports, but isn& rsquo t suitable for diving
